rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on Educ. Code §22.0511, which governs immunity from liability for school district professional employees. The statutes address unrelated subject matter.
quote: A professional employee of a school district is not personally liable for any act that is incident to or within the scope of the duties of the employee's position of employment
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns educator liability immunity, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
